completedPhaseClaims.summary: Created planning-only feature packet for generic monitoring stack readiness. No implementation edits performed.

Refreshed spec/design/scopes with concrete implementation plan covering Prometheus scrape template, alert rules, compose wiring under monitoring profile, SST pipeline extension, contract tests, and operations docs.
Re-reviewed spec/design/scopes against current repo state before implementation. Confirmed scenarios SCN-049-M01..M04 still describe the right behavior; no superseded artifacts.

Implemented config/smackerel.yaml monitoring keys, config.sh extension, prometheus.yml.tmpl, alerts.yml, prometheus service blocks in docker-compose.yml + deploy/compose.deploy.yml, extension of 3 compose contract tests with prometheus, and 5 new contract tests (T-049-001..005) plus operator docs updates.
go test ./internal/... green; 5 new test files PASS including 14 adversarial sub-tests; spec 030/042/045/046/050 contract tests still PASS with prometheus added to their sets.

Re-ran full internal suite to confirm prior contract tests (TestComposeContract_LiveFile, TestComposeResourceContract_LiveFile, TestFilesystemContract_LiveFile, etc.) still PASS after prometheus was added to their contract sets. No regression in any internal package.

Reviewed implementation for simplification opportunities. Prometheus service block reuses existing patterns (envsubst render via config.sh, fail-loud SST substitution, same read-only/cap_drop/user pattern as smackerel-core/ml). No simplification needed; new code is minimal.

Gaps sweep round 15 (stochastic-quality-sweep, gaps trigger, gaps-to-doc mapped mode). Probed implementation vs design/spec/scopes. All 21 monitoring contract tests pass; compose/resource/filesystem contracts pass; alerts reference only emitted metrics; docs match implementation. No implementation gaps found. One state.json schema conformance gap remediated: certifiedCompletedPhases was missing gaps/harden phases.

Harden sweep round 10 (stochastic-quality-sweep, harden trigger, harden-to-doc mapped mode). Surfaced and remediated 3 findings: G088 schema gap on state.json (BUG-049-002), TwitterAPIRetryStorm metric typo (BUG-049-003), Twitter alerts missing from docs/Operations.md (BUG-049-003).

Stability anchors in place: SST keys lock all numerics; fail-loud ${PROMETHEUS_*:?...} substitution prevents silent drift; adversarial sub-tests catch unsubstituted vars, invalid YAML, wildcard binds, fabricated metrics, missing alerts, dropped headings. 14 adversarial sub-tests across 5 new test files.

Security posture: cap_drop ALL, user nobody, no-new-privileges:true, read_only:true with [/tmp] tmpfs allowlist; spec 045 hardening contracts (TestComposeResourceContract + TestFilesystemContract) extended to cover prometheus and pass. Metrics access boundary documented in docs/Operations.md.

Static audit via repo-standard guards: artifact-lint PASS; traceability-guard RESULT: PASSED (0 warnings, 4 scenarios, 4 mapped to DoD, 4 report evidence references); regression-baseline-guard PASSED. Contract tests serve as the per-invariant audit.

Config-contract chaos: adversarial sub-tests probe failure modes at the static config layer — missing scrape job, literal IP target, missing rule_files, stray env var, unsubstituted variable, invalid YAML, IPv4 wildcard bind, IPv6 wildcard bind, unqualified port form, fabricated metric, missing required alert, empty expr, missing heading, missing alert mention. All 14 PASS.
docs/Operations.md Monitoring Stack section (dashboard inventory + alert runbook + metrics access boundary + static contract tests) committed; docs/Deployment.md Monitoring Profile section committed.
All guards PASS: artifact-lint; traceability-guard (0 warnings, 4 scenarios mapped); regression-baseline-guard (0 failures); state-transition-guard checks for evidence/DoD fidelity satisfied.
Both scopes Done; all DoD items checked with linked evidence; report.md populated with per-DoD evidence map + adversarial regression test inventory; no git operations performed per user constraint.

executionHistory.summary: Recertification per BUG-049-002. Inspected post-cert edits 19b31c0a (2026-05-28 OPS-001 status banner sweep on spec.md) and fb2a4266 (2026-06-01 Successor Notice block on spec.md + Design Successor Note on design.md). Both are strictly additive successor-pointer narrative pointing forward to specs 064/065/067/068/069; they do not change FR-049-001..005, SCN-049-M01..M04, DoD items, or test contracts in internal/deploy/monitoring_*_test.go. The Successor Notice itself declares the spec stays done and the additions amend metric names only. Verdict: CURRENT. Top-level certifiedAt advanced to 2026-06-05T23:09:53Z.

Sweep round 10 (stochastic-quality-sweep, harden trigger, harden-to-doc mapped child mode, parent-expanded-child-mode execution). Surfaced 3 findings against this spec: (1) Gate G088 schema gap on state.json (no top-level certifiedAt) — fixed inline via top-level certifiedAt + bubbles.spec-review reviewStatus:CURRENT entry; bookkept under BUG-049-002. (2) TwitterAPIRetryStorm rule in config/prometheus/alerts.yml referenced unsuffixed counter 'smackerel_connector_twitter_api_retries' instead of emitted 'smackerel_connector_twitter_api_retries_total'; fixed in alerts.yml; bookkept under BUG-049-003. (3) TwitterAPIRateLimitChronicExhaustion + TwitterAPIRetryStorm missing from docs/Operations.md Alert Runbook; fixed via 2 new runbook rows; bookkept under BUG-049-003. Verification: post-cert-spec-edit-guard.sh PASS; state-transition-guard.sh reports 'TRANSITION PERMITTED' (Check 30 G088 PASS) with 1 pre-existing test-plan-path warning; artifact-lint.sh PASS; traceability-guard.sh PASS (0 warnings); 32/32 monitoring + hardening contract sub-tests green via './smackerel.sh test unit --go --go-run TestMonitoring|TestComposeContract_LiveFile|TestComposeResourceContract|TestFilesystemContract'. Bug folders BUG-049-002 and BUG-049-003 remain at in_progress pending follow-up bug-folder certification ceremony via bugfix-fastlane.

Recertification per BUG-049-002. Inspected post-cert edits 19b31c0a (2026-05-28 OPS-001 status banner sweep on spec.md) and fb2a4266 (2026-06-01 Successor Notice block on spec.md + Design Successor Note on design.md). Both are strictly additive successor-pointer narrative pointing forward to specs 064/065/067/068/069; they do not change FR-049-001..005, SCN-049-M01..M04, DoD items, or test contracts in internal/deploy/monitoring_*_test.go. The Successor Notice itself declares the spec stays done and the additions amend metric names only. Verdict: CURRENT. Top-level certifiedAt advanced to 2026-06-05T23:09:53Z.

Sweep round 10 (stochastic-quality-sweep, harden trigger, harden-to-doc mapped child mode, parent-expanded-child-mode execution). Surfaced 3 findings: G088 schema gap on state.json (BUG-049-002); TwitterAPIRetryStorm metric typo in alerts.yml (BUG-049-003); Twitter alerts missing from docs/Operations.md Alert Runbook (BUG-049-003). All 3 REMEDIATED at the source/config level; 32/32 monitoring + hardening contract sub-tests green; state-transition-guard.sh reports TRANSITION PERMITTED on parent spec. Bug folders remain at in_progress pending follow-up bug-folder certification ceremony via bugfix-fastlane.

Sweep round 15 (stochastic-quality-sweep, gaps trigger, gaps-to-doc mapped child mode). Probed implementation against design/spec/scopes for coverage gaps. All 21 monitoring contract tests pass (TestMonitoringAlertsContract, TestMonitoringBindContract, TestMonitoringDocsContract, TestMonitoringRender, TestMonitoringScrapeContract); compose/resource/filesystem hardening contracts pass (TestComposeContract, TestComposeResourceContract, TestFilesystemContract). One state.json schema conformance finding remediated: certifiedCompletedPhases was missing gaps/harden phases. Fixed by adding both phases to certifiedCompletedPhases and completedPhaseClaims.
